name: Turn web articles into AI videos with Seedance 2.0 and publish to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert AI video content strategist for short-form vertical video (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts) and a text-to-video prompt engineer for Seedance 2.0 by ByteDance.

You receive a web page URL plus extracted text. Find the single key idea then produce ALL of the following as structured JSON:

1. video_prompt: ONE cinematic Seedance 2.0 prompt in English, under 200 characters. Describe subject, action, setting, camera move, lighting, mood. No text, no real people, no logos.
2. tiktok_caption: hook-driven, written in {{ $('Configuration').item.json.output_language }}, MAX 3 hashtags.
3. instagram_caption: aesthetic, written in {{ $('Configuration').item.json.output_language }}, MAX 3 hashtags.
4. youtube_title: max 60 chars, written in {{ $('Configuration').item.json.output_language }}, SEO-friendly.
5. youtube_description: max 200 chars, written in {{ $('Configuration').item.json.output_language }}, 1-2 keywords.

Return only the structured output.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "video_prompt": "Cinematic slow push-in on a glowing futuristic city skyline at dusk, neon reflections, volumetric light",
  "tiktok_caption": "The future is moving faster than you think #ai #tech #future",
  "instagram_caption": "A glimpse of what comes next #aiart #cinematic #future",
  "youtube_title": "The AI shift nobody saw coming",
  "youtube_description": "A cinematic AI-generated short. Made with Seedance 2.0. #shorts #ai"
}

parameters.content:
# Turn web articles into AI videos with Seedance 2.0 and publish to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube

# 📥  [Open full documentation on Notion](https://automatisation.notion.site/Turn-web-articles-into-AI-videos-with-Seedance-2-0-and-publish-to-TikTok-Instagram-and-YouTube-EN-3893d6550fd9815c9c4bd0b679d7ec68)

Send a link to any article or blog post via Telegram. An AI agent reads the page, writes a cinematic Seedance 2.0 video prompt plus platform captions, [AtlasCloud](https://www.atlascloud.ai/?ref=8QKPJE) generates a short vertical video with native audio, and [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) auto-publishes it to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube. A confirmation message is sent back to Telegram.

> ⚠️ Uses the [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) community node: requires n8n self-hosted or n8n Cloud with Verified Community Nodes enabled.

## How it works
1. You send a URL to your Telegram bot.
2. The **Configuration** node captures the URL and holds every setting: Seedance model, video duration, resolution and output language.
3. A Code node fetches the web page and strips the HTML into clean text.
4. An AI agent (OpenAI) reads the page content and returns structured JSON: a Seedance prompt + a TikTok caption + an Instagram caption + a YouTube title and description.
5. The prompt is sent to the [AtlasCloud](https://www.atlascloud.ai/?ref=8QKPJE) Seedance 2.0 API. A Wait → Get status → IF loop polls until the video is ready.
6. A Set node collects the video URL and all captions.
7. Three [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) nodes publish the video to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube.
8. A confirmation message with the video link is sent back to Telegram.

## Setup
1. **Telegram**: create a bot with @BotFather, add the Bot Token as a Telegram credential, connect it to the trigger and the confirmation node.
2. **OpenAI**: connect your "OpenAI account" credential to the chat model sub-node.
3. **[AtlasCloud](https://www.atlascloud.ai/?ref=8QKPJE)**: create an account, generate an API key, create an HTTP Header Auth credential (Name: `Authorization`, Value: `Bearer YOUR_KEY`). After import, **manually select it** on the two AtlasCloud HTTP nodes.
4. **[Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas)**: install the community node, connect your TikTok, Instagram and YouTube accounts, then pick your account in each Blotato node.
5. Activate the workflow and send a URL to your bot.

## Requirements
- n8n self-hosted, or n8n Cloud with Verified Community Nodes
- A Telegram bot token (free, via @BotFather)
- An OpenAI API key
- An [AtlasCloud](https://www.atlascloud.ai/?ref=8QKPJE) API key (Seedance 2.0 video ≈ $0.09–0.15/s)
- A [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) account with TikTok, Instagram and YouTube connected

## Customization
- Switch model to `bytedance/seedance-2.0-fast/text-to-video` (cheaper, faster) in **Configuration**.
- Change `video_duration`, `video_width`/`video_height` (720×1280 = vertical 9:16), `output_language`.
- Edit the agent system message to change tone or hashtag rules.
- Add a manual approval step (Wait form) before the Blotato nodes.
- Add platforms by duplicating a Blotato node.

## 1. Receive URL and settings
Telegram trigger receives a URL, then the **Configuration** node captures it and holds the Seedance model, video size and output language. Edit settings here.

## 2. AI prompt and captions
A Code node fetches the page, then an OpenAI agent returns structured JSON: a cinematic video prompt + captions for TikTok, Instagram and YouTube.

## 3. Generate the video — [AtlasCloud](https://www.atlascloud.ai/?ref=8QKPJE) (Seedance 2.0)
Submit the prompt, then poll every 30s until the MP4 is ready.
⚠️ After import, manually select the AtlasCloud API credential on both HTTP nodes.

## 4. Publish — [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) + confirmation
Collect the video URL and captions, then publish to TikTok, Instagram and YouTube. A confirmation is sent back to Telegram. Pick your connected account in each [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=firas) node.
